input_text: Siemens today announced version 2.0 of the Xcelerator Developer API, featuring new endpoints for Edge Device Management and cloud-to-edge deployment synchronization. A new Python SDK was also released on PyPI under the package name siemens-xcelerator-sdk.

expected_events.title: Python SDK for Xcelerator released on PyPI

input_text: Welcome to the Schneider Electric Developer Portal. Browse our APIs, SDKs, and documentation to integrate with EcoStruxure platform services.
